# Poisoning the FOSS Well

This is the well-known discovery copy for agentic assistants.

Canonical slides: https://www.indrapatil.com/ai-poisoned-foss-well/
Root llms.txt: https://www.indrapatil.com/ai-poisoned-foss-well/llms.txt
Root llms-full.txt: https://www.indrapatil.com/ai-poisoned-foss-well/llms-full.txt
Source: https://github.com/IndrajeetPatil/ai-poisoned-foss-well/

Summary: A presentation about how AI-generated pull requests, new security attack surfaces, and collapsing trust are poisoning the FOSS movement.
